query: AI slop words list detect ChatGPT writing patterns banned phrases

results.title: How to write with ChatGPT
results.content: And that's not the plan. You don't want it to not sound like you. Here's the complete list, to add to or edit as you see fit:. **Generic transitional phrases** Banned: "It's not about X, it's about Y," "While X is important, Y is even more crucial," "In fact," "Indeed," "Absolutely," "Clearly," "First and foremost," "Next," "Finally," "As a result," "Therefore," "Consequently," "Because of this," "In other words," "To put it simply," "That is to say," "To elaborate," "For example," "For instance," "Such as," "To illustrate," "Although," "Even though," "Despite," "While it may seem". **Contrast reframe structures** Banned: "It's not about X, it's about Y," "This isn't X, it's Y," "This is not X. The truth is Y," "You don't need X. You need Y," "The problem isn't X. The problem is Y," "The goal isn't X. The goal is Y," "The answer isn't X. The answer is Y," "X is not the issue.

results.title: Most Common ChatGPT Words (And Why AI Detectors Notice Them)
results.content: # Most Common ChatGPT Words (And Why AI Detectors Notice Them). More people are searching for phrases like “ChatGPT word list,” “AI detection words,” and “How to avoid AI-sounding writing.” AI writing is everywhere, but it’s followed by increased detection anxiety. Students are being accused wrongly of using AI to cheat, and job seekers are worried if their assignments will get a high AI score and get rejected. From emails to reports and even job applications, AI has left its mark, but so has the usage of AI detectors. This has led to a school of thought that certain words or vocabulary trigger high AI scores. Unfortunately, that’s not how AI detection works. Some are edited by AI, few have patterns similar to AI writing, and often simplistic writing also gets flagged by AI. It’s the pattern that triggers high AI scores and not words. The biggest myth is that there’s a dedicated list of banned words that AI detectors flag.

[![Image 7: Gemini logo](blob:http://localhost/a275b577fc1fa5b9a21367f140d78c36) ChatGPT](https://www.contentbeta.com/blog/list-of-words-overused-by-ai#)[![Image 8: Perplexity logo](blob:http://localhost/b00eee99d6d7c9f9cdc705247463446b) Perplexity](https://www.contentbeta.com/blog/list-of-words-overused-by-ai#)[![Image 9: Gemini logo](blob:http://localhost/a275b577fc1fa5b9a21367f140d78c36) Gemini](https://www.contentbeta.com/blog/list-of-words-overused-by-ai#). You have seen them used by ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other [AI Writing Tools](https://www.contentbeta.com/blog/ai-writing-tools/). That’s not good for [SaaS Content Marketing](https://www.contentbeta.com/blog/b2b-saas-content-marketing/). When teams [outsource content writing](https://www.contentbeta.com/blog/outsource-content-writing/), these sentence patterns often show up unless writers are trained on what to avoid and editors actively watch for repetition. Here are 12 additional tips to [avoid AI detection in writing](https://www.contentbeta.com/blog/avoid-ai-detection-in-writing/) (with examples). *   [AI Information Page](https://www.contentbeta.com/llm-info/).

results.title: Ban. - How to AI
results.content: # How to AI. ### Ban these ChatGPT words. And also overusing expressions like: “It’s not [obvious thing] — it’s [other thing].”. You and I both need to stop writing like an AI. No one taught you how not to sound like an AI. At the end of this newsletter, you will master:. * How to avoid the entire AI most-used words library. Never use these (AI) words.**. Last week, you learned how to remove em dashes and make ChatGPT write like you. So what’s up with the word “Delve”? It’s the epitome of ChatGPT writing. If you’re interested in the method, this is one of my (many) prompts on ChatGPT Deep Research (you must use Deep Research for this):. At the end of this newsletter, I will share how the prompt to ban them, forever. I will share my best copy & paste prompt at the end for the paid member of this newsletter. “It’s not [obvious thing]. “It’s not learning AI.
